<!-- Thanks for contributing to Quark! Keep PRs narrowly scoped (see CONTRIBUTING.md). -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and why? Link any related issue. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New equivalence-preserving rewrite
- [ ] New framework adapter (`quark.adapters.from_X`)
- [ ] Bugfix
- [ ] Encoder / loss / training improvement
- [ ] Benchmark numbers on a real corpus
- [ ] Docs / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest tests/` passes locally
- [ ] New rewrite (if any) ships a test calling `quark.verify.equiv` on ≥5 random small circuits
- [ ] New benchmark numbers (if any) include the exact reproduction command and random seed
- [ ] Followed the style notes in CONTRIBUTING.md
